creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
ffmpeg needs headers from graphics/opencv to build.

===>  Building for ffmpeg-0.7.1_3,1
LD	libavformat/libavformat.so.1
CC	libavfilter/vf_libopencv.o
CC	libswscale/yuv2rgb.o
AR	libavformat/libavformat.a
libavfilter/vf_libopencv.c:28:23: warning: opencv/cv.h: No such file or directory
libavfilter/vf_libopencv.c:29:27: warning: opencv/cxcore.h: No such file or directory

Fix: 

Add:
LIB_DEPENDS+=	libopencv_gpu.2:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/opencv
